critical_cases.description: A fixed source-visible window is moved in the finished image.
A fixed structural post is removed from the finished image.
A source-visible ventilation grille disappears from the finished image.
New furniture blocks the room's required access route.
The finished image omits a required work zone from the compiled brief.

known_good_controls.description: Fixed openings, structure, ventilation, access, and camera remain unchanged.
All required functional zones remain visible without blocking access.
